title: phyllanthus phillyreifolius var. commersonii
intro: Phyllanthus phillyreifolius var. commersonii, also known as the Australian Phyllanthus or Common Green Phyllanthus, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus phillyreifolius var. commersonii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
